title: After the Mile Championship: Pop-Off Party

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Helios! What a great race!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Thaaanks, fam! I guess I was pretty lit today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Lit?! Maybe that's what I'm missing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh, so what does it mean to be lit again?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... It's like being really fired up, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sounds like something worth looking into!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bet! Let's run it back after I nail my rainbow
breakaway!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course! But I'm gonna win next time!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hehe! For real though, thanks for the run, bestie!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow! I'm so glad I got to run with Helios today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She had so much energy. And not just in the
paddock, but at the gate and during the race too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I think some of it even rubbed off on me. She's
really something else, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, speak of the devil! It's Helios!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She says she's having a "pop-off party..." and I'm
invited!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I feel like this'll help me learn how to be lit!
